name: Biscochitos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix 1 cup sugar, butter, sherry, and egg in a large bowl.
3. Stir in 3 cups flour, baking powder, anise, and salt until well combined.
4. Divide the dough into two halves.
5. Roll each half into a sheet that is 1/4 inch thick on a lightly floured board.
6. Cut into shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Place the cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Mix together 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon.
9. Sprinkle the mixture over the cookies.
10. Bake until golden brown.
